codex_progress.current_goal: Prepare a real guarded MetaScalp demo order attempt from live public signal flow

codex_progress.next_required_step: Before any demo POST, run apps/health_check.py against the latest runner summary with --discover-metascalp --select-demo-mexc, then only after explicit user confirmation of parameters and exact phrase METASCALP_DEMO_ORDER run one guarded demo order and capture/reconcile private MetaScalp updates
